title: VETERAN CONNECTIONS HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: GOODWILL WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT VETERAN CONNECTIONS HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides employment-related services to reintegrate homeless veterans into the labor force. Services include job search training and placement, employment readiness training, career exploration, and vocational/technical training. Also provides information about community resources, including housing, transportation, identification, clothing, computer access, and more. 855 Seneca Road Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: -Must be homeless or at risk of becoming homeless, or have been homeless within 60 days prior to enrollment -Must have served at least one day of active military service and have been discharged under any status other than dishonorable Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 431-3339 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 431-3339 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in to a Job Connection site or call to schedule an appointment and complete an eligibility assessment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: DD-214 preferred AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Varies by location Services: Employment Related Transportation * Homeless Veterans General Clothing Provision * Homeless Veterans Public Internet Access Sites * Homeless Veterans Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance * Homeless Veterans Specialized Information and Referral * Homeless Veterans Veteran Employment Programs Work Clothing * Homeless Veterans Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - JOB CONNECTIONS MONEY MANAGEMENT - PROSPERITY PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GOODWILL WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT
